=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/classSelfMismatch_unionGiven.ts(10,57): error TS377046: The `Self` type parameter for this class should be `MyService`. effect(classSelfMismatch)


==== /.src/classSelfMismatch_unionGiven.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Context from "effect/Context"
    
    interface ServiceShape {
      value: number
    }
    
    export class OtherService extends Context.Tag("OtherService")<OtherService, {}>() {}
    
    export class MyService extends Context.Tag("MyService")<MyService | OtherService, ServiceShape>() {}
                                                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377046: The `Self` type parameter for this class should be `MyService`. effect(classSelfMismatch)
